nasb.text: When I rose in the morning to nurse my son, behold, he was dead; but when I looked at him carefully in the morning, behold, he was not my son, whom I had borne.”

esv.text: When I rose in the morning to nurse my child, behold, he was dead. But when I looked at him closely in the morning, behold, he was not the child that I had borne.”

cnv.text: 第二天早上我起來，要給我的兒子吃奶的時候，發覺他死了。那天早晨我再仔細察看，發覺他並不是我所生的兒子！”

ccb.text: 天快亮的时候，我起来给孩子喂奶，发现孩子死了。天亮后，我仔细察看孩子，发现孩子不是我生的。”
